Headline: 3126 Jackson Temporary Westbound Reroute near Congress Plaza
ShortDescription: Westbound  126 Jackson buses are temporarily rerouted via Michigan, Harrison, State and Adams: due to, a Marathon near Congress Plaza.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #126 Jackson buses are temporarily rerouted via Michigan, Harrison, State and Adams: due to, a Marathon near Congress Plaza.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #147 Outer DuSable Lake Shore Express Temporary Northbound Reroute near Congress Plaza
ShortDescription: Northbound 147 Outer DuSable Lake Shore Express buses are temporarily rerouted via Michigan, Harrison and State: due to, a Marathon near Congress Plaza.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #147 Outer DuSable Lake Shore Express buses are temporarily rerouted via Michigan, Harrison and State: due to, a Marathon near Congress Plaza.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Red Line Service Delayed at Wilson
ShortDescription: Red Line trains are standing at Wilson due to an unauthorized person on the tracks. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red Line trains are standing at Wilson due to an unauthorized person on the tracks.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.

Headline: No trains between Howard and Belmont
ShortDescription: Red Line service has been temporarily suspended between Howard and Belmont due to interlocking problems near Montrose.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red Line service has been temporarily suspended between Howard and Belmont due to interlocking problems near Montrose.

As a result, trains are operating only between 95th and Belmont at this time.

Shuttle buses have been requested from Howard to Belmont  to provide connecting service through the affected area.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

See station personnel for further assistance, and pay attention to announcements on trains and at stations for service information.

We are working to restore service as quickly as possible. Allow extra travel time.
